title: Bookmark Manager
description: Build a CRUD API for bookmarks. Each bookmark has: url (required, must be a URL), title (required), tags (text). POST /api/bookmarks creates, GET /api/bookmarks lists all, DELETE /api/bookmarks/:id removes. Validate that url is actually a URL format.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a Bookmarks table:
  url, required
  title, required
  tags

# Your endpoints here
